summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Dams Car Rental iteration 4 (car rating & review system). All 46 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend flows tested and working correctly. New features: Users can rate cars 1-5 stars with optional comments, reviews shown on car detail page, average rating shown on car cards. Review upsert logic working (duplicate review from same user updates existing). Rating validation (1-5 only) working. Admin can delete any review. No critical issues found.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. App uses existing 6 cars across 4 cities and 8 locations. Test reviews created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features all working. New: Car rating & review system. Backend: POST /api/reviews (create/upsert), GET /api/reviews/{car_id}, DELETE /api/reviews/{review_id} (owner or admin). ReviewCreate model (car_id, rating 1-5, comment). Cars now include avg_rating and review_count via enrich_car_with_rating(). Car detail GET /api/cars/{id} includes reviews array. Unique index on reviews (car_id + user_id) for upsert. Frontend: StarRating component (components/StarRating.tsx) with interactive rating (onRate prop), car-detail.tsx has reviews section with write review form (stars + comment), home.tsx car cards show star ratings when avg_rating > 0. All previous features still working (auth, cars, bookings, admin panel, locations management, location-based search).
